home.heroDescription: Create beautiful, customizable countdown timer pages. Share them with a link or embed them on your website. Fully free.

realTime.title: Real-Time Countdowns
realTime.description: Create precise countdown timers that tick in real-time down to the second.

design.title: Full Design Control
design.description: Customize colors, fonts, backgrounds, and add custom CSS for pixel-perfect designs.

share.title: Share Anywhere
share.description: Each countdown gets a unique public URL with rich social media previews.

embed.title: Embeddable
embed.description: Embed your countdown on any website with a simple iframe snippet.

public.title: Public Pages
public.description: Beautiful standalone pages for each countdown, optimized for all devices.

og.title: OG Image Generation
og.description: Dynamic social preview images that show your countdown's current state.

home.ctaDescription: Create your first countdown in under a minute.

explore.title: Explore Countdowns
explore.description: Discover countdowns from the community. Use any as a template to create your own.
explore.noResults: No countdowns found matching your search.
explore.metaDescription: Browse and discover countdown timers created by the community. Find inspiration and use any countdown as a template for your own.

dashboard.noCountdownsDescription: Create your first countdown timer to get started.

form.title: Title
form.descriptionPlaceholder: What are you counting down to?
form.seoKeywordsPlaceholder: birthday countdown, event timer, new year
form.seoKeywordsHint: Comma-separated keywords to help search engines find your countdown.
form.uploadHint: Click to upload (PNG, JPEG, WebP, max 2MB)
form.completionHint: Customize what visitors see when the countdown reaches zero.
form.actionButtonHint: Add a call-to-action button below your countdown timer. Leave text empty to hide the button.
form.hoverColorPlaceholder: Leave empty for no hover effect
form.animationHint: Add falling particle animations to your countdown page.
form.uploadParticle: Upload PNG image for falling particles
form.customCssHint: Add custom CSS to style your countdown page.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: CountdownHub privacy policy. Learn how we handle your data.
privacy.s1Content: When you create an account on CountdownHub, we collect your email address and basic profile information through our authentication provider (Clerk). When you create countdowns, we store the content you provide including titles, descriptions, dates, and uploaded images.
s2Items: Provide and maintain the CountdownHub service
Authenticate your account and manage your countdowns
Display your public countdown pages to visitors
Generate social media preview images for shared countdowns
privacy.s3Content: Your data is stored securely using Supabase (PostgreSQL database and file storage). Uploaded images are stored in Supabase Storage. We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties.
privacy.s4Content: Countdowns you create are accessible via their public URL. Anyone with the link can view the countdown page. Search engines may index public countdown pages. You can delete your countdowns at any time from your dashboard.
privacy.s5Intro: We use the following third-party services:
s5Items: Google Gemini API — AI-powered event date lookup (queries are not stored)
privacy.s6Content: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. We do not use tracking or advertising cookies.
privacy.s7Content: You can delete your countdowns and associated data at any time from your dashboard. To delete your account entirely, please contact us.
privacy.s8Content: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please reach out via the contact information on our website.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.metaDescription: CountdownHub terms of service. Read before using our platform.
terms.s1Content: By accessing and using CountdownHub, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, do not use the service.
terms.s2Content: CountdownHub provides a free platform for creating, customizing, and sharing countdown timer pages. Users can create public countdown pages, embed them on other websites, and share them via unique URLs.
terms.s3Content: You must create an account to use CountdownHub. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and for all activities that occur under your account.
terms.s4Content: You retain ownership of all content you create on CountdownHub, including countdown titles, descriptions, and uploaded images. By creating public countdowns, you grant CountdownHub a license to display that content publicly.
terms.s4Intro: You agree not to upload content that:
s4Items: Violates any applicable laws or regulations
Infringes on intellectual property rights of others
s5Items: Use the service for any illegal purpose
Attempt to bypass security measures or rate limits
Abuse the AI date lookup feature with injection attacks
Use automated tools to create excessive countdowns
terms.s6Content: CountdownHub is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee uninterrupted access to the service. We may modify or discontinue features at any time.
terms.s7Content: CountdownHub shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.
terms.s8Content: We reserve the right to terminate or suspend accounts that violate these terms. You may delete your account and countdowns at any time.
terms.s9Content: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
